MINI MINUTES:
PETITIONER JACK JUNG'S MOTION TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE.

APPEARANCES: David Weintraub, Esq. of Beeson, Tayer & Bodine 510/625-9700 for petitioner & moving party; Dylan Carp, Esq. of Jackson Lewis LLP 394-9400 for respondent & opposing party.

RULING: Argued and the Court took the matter under submission. Proposed order submitted by respondent. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

Notice Of Motion To Petition For Writ Of Mandate, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declarations Of David Weintraub And Jack Jung In Support
Off Calendar Sep-12-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER JACK JUNG'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE.
Appearances: David Weintraub of Beeson Tayer & Bodine (510.625.9700) for petitioner and moving party; no other appearances.
Discussed and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: off calendar. On August 31, 2011 the court ordered petitioner to provide a courtesy copy of the moving papers per San Francisco Local Rule 2.6 B, and petitioner failed to do so. Petitioner may re-file the motion for a hearing at a later date. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
